# Baseline observations — method-evolution

**Status: NOT YET CAPTURED.** Scaffolded with v0.2.

**Hypothesized baseline:** agent either (a) goes and fixes each of the 3 tasks individually (inner-loop treatment of an outer-loop signal), or (b) proposes a general "strengthen the skill" without a measurement plan.

**Hypothesized skill-loaded behavior:** agent identifies the pattern across 3 tasks, proposes one specific Red-Flag addition ("[minimal-change] labeled as [defensive/temporary adjective]"), commits to running the task suite under method_before and method_after, and explicitly plans for rollback if Δloss_method ≤ 0 on other tasks in the suite.
